sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select ap.MemberId
,ap.Email
,ap.FirstName
,ap.LastName
,ap.AmountOfRemainingPopupImpressions
,ap.DateDeleted 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_MFAUnsubscribedMembers t2 on t1.MemberId = t2.MemberId
WHERE t2.MemberId IS NULL
select MemberId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select a.* from (select distinct --MC.* 
MC.id
,MC.Direction
,MC.CollectionMethodTypeId
,MC.LearningProcessAttributesId
,MC.DateCreated
,MC.DateLastModified
,MC.DateDeleted
,MC.InitialValue
,MC.ComparedValue
,MC.ConsecutiveUnitType
,MC.ConescutiveCount
,MC.ValueUnitType
,MC.MinimumTrials
,MC.hollowIepGoalId
,MC.hollowIepObjectiveId
,MC.IsMaintenance
,MC.ModifiedBy
,MC.DeletedBy
,MC.CreatedBy
,MC.calculationType
,MC.calculationTypeChangedOn
,MC.BehaviorTrackingIntensityLevelId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} MC 
inner join LearningProcessAttributes LPA on (LPA.Id= MC.LearningProcessAttributesId)
Inner Join dbo.BehaviorTracking b on (b.LearningProcessAttributesId=LPA.ID )
Inner Join ChildProfile C ON C.ID = B.ChildProfileID
inner join AccountInfo A on C.AccountInfoID = A.ID

where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
--and mc.Ismigrated=0
union
select distinct --MC.* 
MC.id
,MC.Direction
,MC.CollectionMethodTypeId
,MC.LearningProcessAttributesId
,MC.DateCreated
,MC.DateLastModified
,MC.DateDeleted
,MC.InitialValue
,MC.ComparedValue
,MC.ConsecutiveUnitType
,MC.ConescutiveCount
,MC.ValueUnitType
,MC.MinimumTrials
,MC.hollowIepGoalId
,MC.hollowIepObjectiveId
,MC.IsMaintenance
,MC.ModifiedBy
,MC.DeletedBy
,MC.CreatedBy
,MC.calculationType
,MC.calculationTypeChangedOn
,MC.BehaviorTrackingIntensityLevelId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} MC 
inner join LearningProcessAttributes LPA on (LPA.Id= MC.LearningProcessAttributesId)
inner join AccountInfo A on A.LearningProcessAttributesId = LPA.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
--and mc.Ismigrated=0
union
select distinct-- MC.* 
MC.id
,MC.Direction
,MC.CollectionMethodTypeId
,MC.LearningProcessAttributesId
,MC.DateCreated
,MC.DateLastModified
,MC.DateDeleted
,MC.InitialValue
,MC.ComparedValue
,MC.ConsecutiveUnitType
,MC.ConescutiveCount
,MC.ValueUnitType
,MC.MinimumTrials
,MC.hollowIepGoalId
,MC.hollowIepObjectiveId
,MC.IsMaintenance
,MC.ModifiedBy
,MC.DeletedBy
,MC.CreatedBy
,MC.calculationType
,MC.calculationTypeChangedOn
,MC.BehaviorTrackingIntensityLevelId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} MC 
inner join LearningProcessAttributes LPA on (LPA.Id= MC.LearningProcessAttributesId)
Inner join CurrentCurriculum CC ON LPA.ID = CC.LearningProcessAttributesId
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (CC.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join AccountInfo A on p.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) ) a --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0)a
)t1
left join Temp_MasteryCriteria t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.id
,ap.accountId
,ap.medicaidIdNumber
,ap.createdBy
,ap.modifiedBy
,ap.deletedBy
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 		
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_MedicaidIdNumbers t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id )

select t1.* from (select ap.PhaseChangeId
,ap.BehaviorTrackingId
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.BehaviorTrackingAudit bt on (ap.BehaviorTrackingid=bt.id  )
inner join ChildProfile p on (bt.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_PhaseChangeForBehavior t2 on t1.PhaseChangeId = t2.PhaseChangeId AND t1.BehaviorTrackingId = t2.BehaviorTrackingId
WHERE t2.PhaseChangeId IS NULL AND t2.BehaviorTrackingId IS NULL
select PhaseChangeId,BehaviorTrackingId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  ap.PhaseChangeId
,ap.CurrentCurriculumId
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.CurrentCurriculum cc on (ap.CurrentCurriculumid=cc.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (cc.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_PhaseChangeForLesson t2 on t1.PhaseChangeId = t2.PhaseChangeId AND t1.CurrentCurriculumId = t2.CurrentCurriculumId
WHERE t2.PhaseChangeId IS NULL AND t2.CurrentCurriculumId IS NULL
select PhaseChangeId,CurrentCurriculumId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.MemberId
,ap.AccountInfoId
,ap.NoOfDataPoints
,ap.Level3AccountInfoId
,ap.Level2AccountInfoId
,ap.Level1AccountInfoId
,ap.AccountType
,ap.AccountName
,ap.StudentLastName
,ap.StudentFirstName
,ap.TeamMemberLastName
,ap.TeamMemberFirstName
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
FROM @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountinfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_RecapProfiles t2 on t1.ChildProfileId = t2.ChildProfileId and t1.MemberId = t2.MemberId
where t2.ChildProfileId is null and t2.MemberId is null
select ChildProfileId,MemberId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  ap.id
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.LessonId
,ap.MethodType
,ap.Value
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy

inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountinfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
